archetype: Automated Avian Influenza Outbreak Detection and Response System for Poultry Farms
description: This system detects early signs of Avian Influenza outbreaks in poultry farms, alerting farmers and animal health authorities to take prompt action, leveraging machine learning on farm sensor data and integrating with veterinary laboratory information systems. The system must adhere to strict biosecurity protocols and comply with international animal health regulations.
rules: MUST integrate with OIE (World Organisation for Animal Health) standards for Avian Influenza reporting
MUST comply with NPIP (National Poultry Improvement Plan) guidelines for biosecurity and disease control
MUST use machine learning models trained on historical farm sensor data and veterinary laboratory results
MUST provide real-time alerts to farmers and animal health authorities via SMS and email
MUST maintain audit trails for all system activities and user interactions
anti_patterns: DO NOT rely solely on manual reporting by farmers, as this can lead to delayed detection and response
DO NOT use generic machine learning models not tailored to poultry farm data and Avian Influenza patterns
DO NOT neglect to integrate with existing farm management systems and veterinary laboratory information systems
key_technical_challenges: Developing machine learning models that can accurately detect early signs of Avian Influenza from noisy and variable farm sensor data
Integrating with diverse veterinary laboratory information systems and handling varying data formats and protocols
Ensuring system scalability and performance to handle large volumes of farm sensor data and user interactions

recommended_stack.language: Python + for its extensive machine learning libraries and data science ecosystem
recommended_stack.framework: Flask + for building a scalable and modular web application
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostgreSQL + for handling complex queries and integrating with veterinary laboratory information systems
recommended_stack.cache: Redis + for caching frequently accessed farm sensor data and system configurations
recommended_stack.message_broker: RabbitMQ + for handling real-time alerts and system notifications

compliance_flags: OIE (World Organisation for Animal Health) standards
